cross_scene_arcs.title: Marital Turmoil and Reconciliation Attempts
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal's marriage deteriorates from obliviousness to divorce and infidelity crises, leading to injury and temporary truce, followed by reconciliation attempts that face rejection but end in a public declaration of love and a tentative step forward.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Tracy will fully reconcile with Cal.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Social Isolation and Manipulative Mentorship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After his friend ends their friendship, Cal becomes isolated and falls under Jacob's manipulative guidance in dating, struggling until he forms a genuine connection with Kate.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Connected with Kate but still under Jacob's influence
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cal's dependence on Jacob and ability to build independent relationships.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Adjustment to Divorced Life
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cal moves into a basic apartment, loses personal items under Jacob's pressure, feels uncomfortable in new social settings, but eventually gains hope and determination after a public speech.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Robbie's Romantic Pursuit of Jessica
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Robbie's awkward and persistent pursuit of Jessica, from initial embarrassment through repeated rejections to a final apology that leaves him hopeful but uncertain.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Horrified and frozen in embarrassment after being caught masturbating by Jessica.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Love-struck and content after apologizing to Jessica and receiving a kiss.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jessica is leaving for Stanford early, making their future relationship uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Robbie's Conflict and Reconciliation with Cal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Robbie navigates family disruption, from learning of his parents' divorce to accusing his father of betrayal, culminating in a public reconciliation during graduation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shocked by the revelation of his parents' divorce.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconciled with Cal after admitting he was wrong about love.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jacob's Relationship with Hannah
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob's initial attraction to Hannah is rebuffed, but she later initiates a relationship, leading to genuine emotional connection and conflict with her father, ending in conditional acceptance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob is attracted to Hannah but rejected after aggressive flirting.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob is in a committed relationship with Hannah, conditionally accepted by Cal.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cal's distrust and threat of violence if Jacob hurts Hannah.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jacob's Mentorship and Conflict with Cal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jacob intervenes in Cal's life to teach dating skills, but their relationship turns adversarial when Jacob dates Cal's daughter, culminating in confrontation and a fragile truce.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jacob establishes control over Cal's social life with a critical offer.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jacob and Cal reach a truce after conflict over Hannah, with Cal issuing a threat.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The underlying tension and conditional nature of their truce.
